svg.aria-label: Animated terminal showing: cat /etc/motd, neofetch --ascii_distro dev-machine, status --me, uptime --emotional, ./dad-joke --random --format=fancy
svg.title: Animated terminal showing: cat /etc/motd, neofetch --ascii_distro dev-machine, status --me, uptime --emotional, ./dad-joke --random --format=fancy
svg.desc:
william@dev:~$ cat /etc/motd ╔════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗ ║ ║ ║ WILLIAM'S DEV TERMINAL v2026.05 ║ ║ Security • AI/ML • Homelab • Dad Jokes ║ ║ Mist 64°F | Humidity: 96% ║ ║ ║ ╚════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝ william@dev:~$ neofetch --ascii_distro dev-machine william@dev-machine ─────────────────── OS: DadOS LTS (Linux + Coffee) Shell: /bin/dad-jokes Uptime: 20+ years (one continuous session) Role: Security Engineer • Multi-Agent AI • Homelabber Location: southern PA, basement-datacenter Languages: TypeScript, Python, Go, Rust Editor: nvim
● ● ● ● ● ● ● ● william@dev:~$ status --me
✓ nexus-agents online · 15 models ✓ homelab BOSH + CF healthy ✓ vuln-bot briefing shipped ⚠ coffee refill required ✓ dad-joke buffer overflowing
william@dev:~$ uptime --emotional . built with care (and caffeine) william@dev:~$ ./dad-joke --random --format=fancy ╔════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗ ║ ║ ║ DAD JOKE OF THE DAY - May 25 ║ ║ Category: SECURITY ║ ║ ║ ║ Q: Why did the pentester bring a ladder to work? ║ ║ ║ ║ A: To escalate privileges! ║ ║ ║ ╚════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝ william@dev:~$ gh api users/williamzujkowski --jq '.public_repos,.followers' ╔════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗ ║ ║ ║ GITHUB: @williamzujkowski ║ ║ Repos: 88 Followers: 25 ║ ║ Following: 51 Gists: 134 ║ ║ Member since: Sep 2015 ║ ║ ║ ╚════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝ william@dev:~$ cat /etc/goodbye.txt ╔════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗ ║ ║ ║ Thanks for visiting! ║ ║ ║ ║ May your: ║ ║ - Code compile without warnings ║ ║ - Tests pass on first try ║ ║ - Bugs be easily reproducible ║ ║ - Coffee stay hot ║ ║ - Git conflicts be minimal ║ ║ ║ ║ See you in the commits! ║ ║ ║ ╚════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝

g.text: ║ DAD JOKE OF THE DAY - May 25 ║
║ Q: Why did the pentester bring a ladder to work? ║
